case_title: STATE OF CA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DPT VS. DERRICK L PARKER

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DPT
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DPT AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, DERRICK L JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, DERRICK L $566.72 PRINCIPAL, $103.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $669.72, TOTAL $669.72
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT & REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THE ENTIRE ACTION JUDGMENT OF DEC-05-2001 SET ASIDE
